checks.details: Transaction amounts use BigDecimal with scale(2). Credit limit checks prevent over-limit transactions. Balance updates are atomic with transaction creation
Transaction records are immutable after creation. Running balance maintained consistently. Foreign key constraints to card and account tables
Authentication required. Transaction amounts validated (positive, within limits). Card status verified before processing
Transaction listing matches COBOL paging behavior. Transaction type codes map correctly. Amount precision matches PIC S9(9)V99
Service layer handles business rules, sealed interface for transaction types, 90% line coverage
